caption: Q11 What factors influence your choice of print? (select all that apply)
description: A horizontal bar chart showing factors for choosing print. Reading experience is the highest factor at approximately 65%, followed by Convenience at 50%, Habit/personal preference at 48%, Access options via my library at 42%, Workflow at 35%, and Other at 18%.

caption: Q12 What factors influence your choice of digital? (select all that apply)
description: A horizontal bar chart showing factors for choosing digital. Convenience is the highest factor at approximately 75%, followed by Access options via my library at 58%, Workflow at 40%, Reading experience at 18%, Habit/personal preference at 18%, and Other at 15%.
